name: Alpha Tollbooth
description: Alpha monetization template with 0.5% to 3% fees only on positive finalized copied-lot PnL.
degenPitch: If followers win from your copied lot, you can take a visible cut. If they lose, you get nothing.
whatItDoes: Configures alpha fee rates from 0.5% to 3%.
Locks fee bps at copied-lot entry.
Accrues fees only after positive finalized copied-lot PnL.
cursorPrompt: Build an Alpha Tollbooth using DNA x402. Allow 0.5% to 3% alpha fees, lock fee bps at copied-lot entry, and create fees only on positive finalized copied-lot profit.
suggestedPrompt: Build an Alpha Tollbooth using DNA x402. Allow 0.5% to 3% alpha fees, lock fee bps at copied-lot entry, and create fees only on positive finalized copied-lot profit.
